name: mattermost
description: Mattermost platform: send and receive messages via Mattermost REST API

config_schema.label: Mattermost Server URL
config_schema.description: Base URL of the Mattermost server.

config_schema.label: Access Token Name
config_schema.description: Name of the Mattermost personal access token to use (generated during setup).

config_schema.label: Enable inbound polling
config_schema.description: Enable polling for incoming messages (only relevant in polling mode).

config_schema.label: Polling interval (seconds)
config_schema.description: How often to poll for new messages (only used in polling mode)

config_schema.label: Connection Mode
config_schema.description: How to detect new messages: 'polling' or 'websocket' (real-time)

config_schema.label: Setup Team Name
config_schema.description: Team to create during setup. Required for setup (not for platform operation).

config_schema.label: Setup Channel Name
config_schema.description: Channel to create during setup. Required for setup (not for platform operation).

config_schema.label: Bot Username
config_schema.description: Username of the bot account used during setup. Required for setup.

config_schema.label: Bot Password
config_schema.description: Password for the bot account. Required for first-time setup when the bot user does not yet exist.

config_schema.label: Admin Username
config_schema.description: Admin account to create during setup (optional). Uses the first system admin if not provided.

config_schema.label: Admin Password
config_schema.description: Password for the admin account (optional, only used if admin_user is set).

config_schema.label: Test Username
config_schema.description: Test user to create during setup (optional).

config_schema.label: Test Password
config_schema.description: Password for the test user (optional, only used if test_user is set).

config_schema.label: Max File Download Size (bytes)
config_schema.description: Maximum file size in bytes to download from the platform API. Files larger than this are not downloaded; only metadata and a file URL reference are included. Default: 10 MB (10485760).
